home projects writing github resume

Lucas Bucht

Electrical engineer interested in audio electronics and integrated circuits.

I'm a junior electrical engineering student at the University of Pittsburgh who'd rather build something than buy it. I've designed a guitar fuzz pedal around an LM386 analog signal path, hand-built a guitar, restored vintage amplifiers, and worked through digital design fundamentals with a VHDL calculator on an FPGA. I'm drawn to integrated circuits and communications signals, and I'm always looking for the next interesting problem to dig into.

Hardware

Fuzz Guitar Pedal

2026

Designed, prototyped, built, and revised a custom fuzz pedal using an LM386 op-amp clipping circuit.

PrototypingSignal ProcessingAltium DesignerAnalog Circuit Design

Vintage Amplifier Rebuild

2026

Rebuilt internals of a vintage amp by recapping, fixing lifting solder pads, and adjusting the bias control to prevent distortion.

AmplifierDebuggingSolderingSignal Processing
Software

VHDL ALU Calculator

2025

Built a complete datapathin Siemens HDL Designer, including a 4x8 register and ALU.

VHDLALUDatapathModelSimQuartus PrimeDE10-Lite FPGA
